source_jobs.title: Department Manager - Go Outdoors
source_jobs.description: <p>Full Time Department Manager required for a big box retail unit. Must have experience of managing large teams in a pressurised environment. Will suit an experienced big store supervisor, small store assistant/ store manager or big store department manager.&nbsp;</p>
